title: Sentence Correction - Solved Question and Answer

content.problemStatement:
Sentence correction involves identifying and fixing grammatical, punctuation, or structural errors in a sentence to make it clear and accurate

Sentence Correction questions and answers are provided below for you to learn and practice.

Question 1:
Rohan went to the office despite of his illness.
a) To
b) Despite
c) Of

Answer: Rohan went to the office despite his illness.

Question 2:
Rahul, who he is my best friend, is a singer.
a) who
b) best
c) he

Answer: Rahul, who is my best friend, is a singer.

Question 3:
No matter what that I do, I can't make everyone happy.
a) that
b) make
c) what

Answer: No matter what I do, I can’t make everyone happy.

Question 4:
Yash is busy at the work and won't be home before 11.
a) the
b) be
c) work

Answer: Yash is busy at work and won’t be home before 11.

Question 5:
We have decided to quit the team a week ago.
a) have
b) a
c) decided

Answer: We decided to quit the team a week ago.

Question 6:
She should complain of if she is not happy with the service she receives.
a) of
b) with
c) if

Answer: She should complain if she is not happy with the service she receives.

Question 7:
She had better not to wake Simran up when get home.
a) had not to
b) to
c) wake

Answer: She had better not wake him up when he gets home.

Question 8:
He should tell to me exactly what happened there.
a) to
b) tell
c) what

Answer: He should tell me exactly what happened there.
